summary: FY Summary Dashboard Testing - ALL TESTS PASS. Backend: 16/16 pytest tests passed. Frontend: FY Summary Dashboard shows all 10 sections correctly with data. Monthly Report tab still works.

1_fy_summary_api_returns_all_sections.details: API returns all 10 required data sections plus metadata

2_fy_summary_dashboard_frontend.details: FY Summary tab visible in navigation, dashboard renders all 10 sections correctly

3_cash_bank_total_row.details: Cash & Bank section shows Cash, Bank and Total rows. Total correctly sums Cash + Bank (Opening=₹0, In=₹70,000, Out=₹50,000, Closing=₹20,000)

4_paddy_stock_section.details: Paddy Stock shows Opening=0, In=100 Qtl, Used=0, Closing=100 Qtl

5_frk_stock_section.details: FRK Stock shows all fields (Opening, Purchased, Used, Closing, Total Cost)

6_byproducts_all_5_products.details: Byproduct Stock shows all 5 products: bran, kunda, broken, kanki, husk with Opening/Produced/Sold/Closing/Revenue columns

7_mill_parts_with_opening_stock.details: Mill Parts Stock section shows Belt with Opening=0, In=210, Used=0, Closing=210 Pcs

8_diesel_accounts_with_opening_balance.details: Diesel Accounts shows Arihant Fuels with Opening/Diesel/Paid/Balance columns

9_local_party_summary.details: Local Party Accounts shows Parties=3, Opening Bal=₹0, Total Debit=₹4,000, Paid=₹0, Closing=₹4,000

10_staff_advances_section.details: Staff Advances shows Eshwer with Opening=₹0, Advance=₹0, Deducted=₹0, Balance=₹0

11_private_trading_section.details: Private Trading shows Paddy Purchase (Qty, Amount, Paid, Balance) and Rice Sales sections

12_monthly_report_regression.details: Staff > Monthly Report tab loads correctly. Shows Mar 2026 Staff Attendance Summary with Present, Absent, Half Day, Holiday (CH), Days Worked, Per Day, Est. Salary, Advance columns. Eshwer: P=2, A=0, H=0, CH=0, Days=2, ₹400/day, Est.Sal=₹800, Advance=₹2,000

14_diesel_summary_api_opening_balance.details: /api/diesel-accounts/summary returns grand_opening_balance and opening_balance per pump

15_local_party_summary_api_opening_balan.details: /api/local-party/summary returns grand_opening_balance and opening_balance per party

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 - FY Summary Dashboard feature fully tested. All 10 sections (Cash & Bank, Paddy Stock, Milling, FRK Stock, Byproducts, Mill Parts, Diesel, Local Party, Staff Advances, Private Trading) render correctly with opening vs closing balances. Total row in Cash & Bank correctly sums Cash + Bank. Monthly Report tab still works. All 16 backend tests pass. Version 3.7.0 features validated.
